description: Count deaths or trophies and display them on your livestream
alert_total_trophies: You must define the total trophies to be earned first
alert_all_trophies: You already have earned all trophies
invalid_widget_type: Invalid widget for this input. Check if it really belongs to this widget.

modal.intro: With StatsCounter, you can create and display custom counters for deaths and trophies directly on your livestream.
modal.step_generate: After setting up a counter, click on "Generate widget URL" to create a unique link.
modal.step_use_obs: This link can be used in OBS as a browser source to show the counter live during your stream.
modal.step_storage: Saved widgets are stored locally in your browser so you can come back and pick up where you left off.
modal.new_theme: New themes added with custom fonts! Go check them out in the theme selector!
modal.support_us_update: If you like and use the project and want to help with any amount, feel free to support the project through the link at the top of the page. This helps keep the project active and constantly evolving.

support_us: Liked the project? Consider supporting with any amount
no_trophy: Basic 2 - no icons and no borders
null_id: You must input an ID first.

tutorialModal.step1Description: Choose the counter type and its theme.
tutorialModal.step2Description: Use the 'Generate URL' button and copy the unique link.
tutorialModal.step3Description: Paste the URL into OBS as a browser source. Make sure to follow the recommended size according to your chosen theme.
tutorialModal.step4Description: Copy the ID of your previous widget, paste it into the corresponding field to control the counter again, and if you have not added it yet, copy the existing URL and add it to OBS again.
tutorialModal.step5Title: Come back here whenever you need
tutorialModal.step5Description: Still have questions? You can come back here through the menu at the top of the site.

give_star_github: Leave a star on the repository :)

hotkeys.title: Hotkeys
hotkeys.browser_advice: The browser must stay open for this to work.
hotkeys.advice: Some shortcuts are already assigned by the browser and therefore may not work in the widget, but instead trigger browser actions.
hotkeys.reload_advice: Make sure to reload the page so the hotkeys are assigned correctly.

notice_update: [NEW!] It is now possible, within the settings section (accessible via the icon next to the StatsCounter title), to set hotkeys for increasing/decreasing the widget counters!

new_version.title: New version 1.1.0 arrived!
new_version.description: StatsCounter has a new look, along with features now permanently released such as hotkeys.
new_version.thanks: Thank you very much for your support!

desktop_app_notice.title: The Stats Counter desktop app has arrived
desktop_app_notice.description: You can now bring Stats Counter to the desktop and use hotkeys even while the app is minimized or while you are working in another window.
desktop_app_notice.complement: Alongside more practical stream control, this release also opens the door for advanced features like full widget customization and many more additions.
desktop_app_notice.banner_text: The desktop app is here: global hotkeys, more freedom during your stream, and new customization possibilities.
desktop_app_notice.highlight_hotkeys: Hotkeys working even while the app is minimized and you are in another window.
desktop_app_notice.highlight_focus: More practical control without depending on the browser staying open.
desktop_app_notice.highlight_features: A desktop foundation ready for full widget customization and many more features.

desktop_app_landing.title: Less browser limitation. More real control over your stream.
desktop_app_landing.description: Stats Counter Desktop is built for people who actually use the counter and want a more practical, more reliable experience that can grow far beyond the web version.
desktop_app_landing.beta_description: The desktop app is still in beta, but it already delivers clear day-to-day advantages. And because it runs on desktop, it opens the door to many more features and much deeper widget customization.
desktop_app_landing.access_description: Desktop app access is unlocked for supporters who contribute at one of the levels below.
desktop_app_landing.support_br_description: Unlocks the desktop app, activation key, and download link.
desktop_app_landing.support_global_value: US$10 or more on Buy Me a Coffee
desktop_app_landing.support_global_description: Unlocks the desktop app, activation key, and download link.
desktop_app_landing.support_global_cta: Support through Buy Me a Coffee
desktop_app_landing.support_global_email_notice: Use a valid email address on your Buy Me a Coffee account, because the access license will be sent to that email. If the email cannot be found to send the license, the amount will be refunded.
desktop_app_landing.email_title: Already supported but still missing your key?
desktop_app_landing.email_description: If you supported the project before the desktop app launched and still have not received your activation key and download link, send an email with proof of payment to the address below.

current_features.title: Right now it already gives you two clear advantages.
current_features.description: No vague promises: these are the features that already make the desktop app worth considering today.
current_features.hotkeys_description: Your hotkeys keep working even while the app is minimized, without relying on the browser tab staying open.
current_features.timer_description: Track how long it took you to move from one trophy to the next and display the date of the latest trophy directly on the widget.
current_features.timer_screenshot_alt: Desktop app screenshot showing the trophy widget timer
current_features.customization_description: You can now customize the counter completely, including font, shadow, color, font size, counter position, icon size, icon placement, and much more.
current_features.customization_screenshot_alt: Desktop app screenshot showing the full counter customization options

future.title: Desktop is not just a new version. It is the foundation for the next phase of the product.
future.description: Because it is no longer constrained by the browser, the desktop app makes room for a more complete, more flexible, and much more customizable experience.
future.foundation_description: The desktop environment makes it possible to build features that would be limited or less comfortable in the web version.
future.customization_description: The goal is to expand both the visual and functional possibilities of the widgets with much more freedom than the browser allows.

supporters.title: Supporters
supporters.desc: To the supporters, my sincere thanks:
supporters.warn: *If your channel is not here, get in touch by email
